#!/usr/bin/env python3
from __future__ import annotations
from pathlib import Path
import re, csv, json

ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
IN_DIR = ROOT / 'DROP_DECOMPILED_FBI_HERE'
OUT_DIR = ROOT / 'reports' / 'decompiled_car_truck_parse'
OUT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

case_re = re.compile(r'case\s+(0x[0-9A-Fa-f]+|\d+)\s*:\s*(?:\r?\n\s*)?(?:return\s+)?["\']?([A-Za-z0-9_ ./\\-]+)?["\']?', re.I)
return_re = re.compile(r'return\s+["\']([^"\']+)["\']', re.I)
terms = ['CAR','TRUCK','WAGON','COACH','STAGECOACH','CART','VEHICLE','TRAIN','PLAYER_CAR','PLAYERCAR']

rows=[]
term_hits=[]
files=list(IN_DIR.glob('*.txt'))+list(IN_DIR.glob('*.c'))+list(IN_DIR.glob('*.cpp'))+list(IN_DIR.glob('*.wsc.txt'))
for path in files:
    text=path.read_text('utf-8',errors='replace')
    lines=text.splitlines()
    for i,line in enumerate(lines,1):
        upper=line.upper()
        if any(t in upper for t in terms):
            term_hits.append({'file':path.name,'line':i,'text':line[:300]})
    for m in case_re.finditer(text):
        val_s=m.group(1)
        try: val=int(val_s,0)
        except Exception: continue
        # find return/name in next 4 lines from case position
        start_line=text[:m.start()].count('\n')+1
        snippet='\n'.join(lines[start_line-1:start_line+5])
        ret=''
        mr=return_re.search(snippet)
        if mr: ret=mr.group(1)
        elif m.group(2): ret=m.group(2).strip()
        if ret or any(t in snippet.upper() for t in terms):
            rows.append({'file':path.name,'line':start_line,'case_value_dec':val,'case_value_hex':f'0x{val:08X}','return_or_label':ret,'snippet':snippet[:1000]})

with (OUT_DIR/'vehicle_case_returns.csv').open('w',newline='',encoding='utf-8') as f:
    fields=['file','line','case_value_dec','case_value_hex','return_or_label','snippet']
    w=csv.DictWriter(f,fields); w.writeheader(); w.writerows(rows)
with (OUT_DIR/'vehicle_term_hits.csv').open('w',newline='',encoding='utf-8') as f:
    fields=['file','line','text']
    w=csv.DictWriter(f,fields); w.writeheader(); w.writerows(term_hits)
(OUT_DIR/'summary.json').write_text(json.dumps({'files_scanned':[p.name for p in files],'case_rows':len(rows),'term_hits':len(term_hits)},indent=2),encoding='utf-8')
print('Scanned',len(files),'files')
print('Case rows:',len(rows))
print('Term hits:',len(term_hits))
print('Output:',OUT_DIR)
